title: PVP SMP Deluxe
description: PVP Focused Texturepack | Low Fire | Low Shield | Vanilla Like.
body:
# A Vanilla Style PvP Texturepack for Many PvP Kits,

**Crystal**; **Sword**; **Axe**

## SMP Deluxe PvP
Retextures alot of PvP Based things like:
_Smaller Swords_.
_Smaller Tools_.
_Smaller Totems_.
_Diffrent Mace Enchantment Textures_.




A Texture Pack that changes the Tools and the End Crystals and Totems of Undying.
Also Changes some Paintings.

There are 2 Versions of the Pack on my Profile **Smp Deluxe** and **PvP Smp Deluxe** both of them you can find on my Profile.


Its ment for SMP pvp and Normal Multiplayer.

**Preview Video from Version 2.3**
